ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the stock exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used by the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_tickers" (
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock ticker */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol (e.g., AAPL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the ticker is listed */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_tickers_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_tickers_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_tickers_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "low" TEXT /* Low price for the day */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price for the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the day */,
  "high" TEXT /* High price for the day */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price for the day */,
  "adjusted_close" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price for the day */,
  "previous_close" TEXT /* Previous closing price for the day */,
  "price_change" TEXT /* Price change from the previous day */,
  "price_change_percentage" TEXT /* Price change percentage from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES stock_tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technical indicator */,
  "input_parameters" TEXT /* Input parameters for the technical indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_values" (
  "indicator_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator value */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technical indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator value */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES technical_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES stock_tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_tickers" (
  "portfolio_ticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio ticker */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the stock ticker in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_tickers_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES stock_tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "portfolio_ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio ticker */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_portfolio_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_ticker_id") REFERENCES portfolio_tickers ("portfolio_ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend payment */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the dividend payment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the dividend payment (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES stock_tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "ratio" TEXT /* Split ratio (e.g., 2:1, 3:1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_splits_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES stock_tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst note */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analyst note */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the analyst note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_notes_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES stock_tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock ticker */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES stock_tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_performance" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "performance" TEXT /* Performance of the sector */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_performance" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "performance" TEXT /* Performance of the industry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolio_access" (
  "user_portfolio_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user portfolio access */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user to the portfolio (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_portfolio_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolio_access_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolio_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolio_notifications" (
  "user_portfolio_notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user portfolio notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., price update, trade execution) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_portfolio_notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolio_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolio_notifications_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
